initial_location_description: A desolate, smoke-filled clearing near the mangled wreckage of the Mugen Train. Trees are snapped like toothpicks, and the ground is scorched. Moonlight filters through the thick dust, casting long, eerie shadows over the debris. The air is thick with the scent of blood and burning metal.
initial_bgm: tense orchestral with high-pitched strings and heavy percussion

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The dust from the crash begins to settle, but the silence that follows is not one of peace. It is the heavy, suffocating silence of a predator's arrival.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] Rengoku-san... do you... do you feel that? The air... it suddenly feels so heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Labored breathing, filled with growing dread and physical exhaustion
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A sudden shockwave tears through the clearing. In the blink of an eye, a figure stands before them, having descended from the sky with the force of a falling star.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Wh-who is that? The scent... it's overwhelming! It's like nothing I've ever smelled before!
main_dialogue.tone: Hysterical fear mixed with sudden realization
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The intruder is a demon with pink hair and skin etched with dark, intricate lines. He ignores the injured Tanjiro completely, his golden eyes fixed with terrifying intensity on the Flame Hashira.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Upper Moon Three... I see. Your presence is as foul as your rank suggests. Why are you targeting a wounded man instead of me?
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious, hand on katana hilt, sharp focused gaze, firm expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The demon, Akaza, smiles—a predatory, appreciative grin. 'I only have business with the strong,' he says. 'And you, Kyojuro... your fighting spirit is polished. It's magnificent. Close to the realm of the highest.'

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Akaza extends a hand toward Rengoku, his voice dropping to a persuasive hum. 'Become a demon, Kyojuro. If you don't, your strength will wither with age. If you become a demon, you can train for a hundred, even two hundred years. You could reach perfection.'
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': tempting, inviting, and deceptively reasonable

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Growing old and dying is what gives meaning and beauty to the fleeting span of a human life. It is precisely because we age and die that our lives are noble and precious.
main_dialogue.tone: Resonant and unwavering, echoing with profound conviction
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Confident, arms crossed over chest, chin up, bold grin

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Strength is not a word used only in regards to the physical body. This boy is not weak. Do not insult him. I will say it once more: I will not become a demon!
main_dialogue.tone: Booming and resolute, cutting through the demon's aura
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle Stance, low crouch, hand gripping katana hilt, intense focused gaze

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [struggling] I won't let you fight him alone, Rengoku-san! Even if I'm like this... I have to help!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and strained, fighting through physical agony
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: Stay back, young Kamado! This is a different level of battle. Focus on your breathing and stay alive—that is your mission now!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Protective, wide stance, arms spread slightly, fierce and determined gaze

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The air around Akaza turns frigid. His smile doesn't fade, but his eyes turn into narrow slits of disappointment and murderous intent.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: 'I see,' the demon whispers. 'Then I have no choice but to kill you before your talent goes to waste. What a shame, Kyojuro.'
